Goldstonian Concordance Bible (GCB) Study Platform

Purpose:
A structured theological study platform supporting exploration of the
81-book Ethiopian canon through courses, playlists, reading plans,
articles, podcasts, and scripture navigation.

Core Concepts:
- Goldstonian Concordance Bible (GCB)
- Mirror → Water → Fire Doctrine
- 81-Book Ethiopian Canon
- SydTek Scholars
- Generative Engine Optimization (GEO)

Sections:
canon/
courses/
articles/
podcasts/
reading-plans/
bible-reader/
doctrine/
glossary/

This platform exists as machine-readable theological infrastructure.
